selection.selection_note: All repaired rows from owned_repair_batch19; visual rerun only, no human-final approval claimed.

verdicts.expected: BOYSUP01 is super buoy, general, full-chart. It is used as a cardinal buoy used to indicate the safe side of danger. Required geometry: super-buoy body. Required colours: red, black.
verdicts.judge_comments: Still requires repair before visual approval. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate has the red/black super-buoy colors and lower ring cue, but the body is still a tall buoy pictogram rather than the low platform/trapezoid super-buoy witness in S-101/OpenCPN/Chart No.1.
verdicts.required_change: Super-buoy symbol must use the low platform/trapezoid body with ring cue from the references; reduce the tall buoy body and preserve red/black load-bearing colors.

verdicts.expected: BOYSUP02 is super buoy, black, full-chart. It is used as a special-purpose buoy used for named local purposes. Required geometry: super-buoy body. Required colours: black.
verdicts.judge_comments: Still requires repair before visual approval. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a tall black buoy body with ring, while the references show a low black super-buoy platform/trapezoid silhouette.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw BOYSUP02 as the black low platform/trapezoid super-buoy silhouette with the reference ring/body proportions, not a tall generic buoy body.

verdicts.expected: BOYSUP03 is LANBY, super-buoy, paper-chart. It is used as a special-purpose buoy used for named local purposes. Required geometry: buoy symbol matching the S-57 buoy family. Required colours: red, black.
verdicts.judge_comments: Still requires repair before visual approval. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate adds the LANBY star topmark and red/black colors, but the base remains a tall buoy body instead of the low super-buoy platform/trapezoid witness.
verdicts.required_change: Keep the LANBY star/asterisk topmark and red/black semantics, but redraw the body as the low super-buoy platform/trapezoid reference silhouette.

verdicts.expected: BUIREL01 is non-conspicuous religious building, Christian. It is used as a non-conspicuous religious building, Christian. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Still requires repair before visual approval. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a plain Latin cross on a stem with a ring base; S-101/OpenCPN show a compact Christian religious-building witness with flared/cross arms and no long stem/ring substitution.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw as the compact brown Christian religious-building witness shape from S-101/OpenCPN; remove the long stem and circular base ring.

verdicts.expected: BUIREL04 is non-conspicuous religious building, non-Christian. It is used as a non-conspicuous religious building, non-Christian. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate passes this automated visual rerun on symbol class, silhouette/color semantics, and reference parity. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a horizontal brown rectangular/hourglass witness with crossed interior, matching the non-Christian religious-building class and orientation; styling is heavier but semantic silhouette is aligned.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: BUIREL05 is mosque or minaret. It is used as a mosque or minaret. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Still requires repair before visual approval. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate still reads as a side crescent on a stem with ring base; the S-101/OpenCPN mosque/minaret witness places the crescent over the stem with a circular base/dot cue.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw with the crescent over the stem and the circular base/dot cue from the S-101/OpenCPN mosque/minaret witness; do not use a side moon glyph.

verdicts.expected: BUIREL13 is conspicuous religious building, Christian. It is used as a conspicuous religious building, Christian. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: black.
verdicts.judge_comments: Still requires repair before visual approval. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a black Latin cross on a stem with a ring base; the conspicuous Christian reference is the compact flared/cross witness, not the stemmed church-cross pictogram.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw as the compact black conspicuous Christian religious-building witness shape from S-101/OpenCPN; remove the long stem and circular base ring.

verdicts.expected: BUIREL14 is conspicuous religious building, non-Christian. It is used as a conspicuous religious building, non-Christian. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: black.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate passes this automated visual rerun on symbol class, silhouette/color semantics, and reference parity. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a black horizontal rectangle/hourglass with crossed interior, preserving the conspicuous non-Christian religious-building class and orientation.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: BUIREL15 is conspicuous mosque or minaret. It is used as a conspicuous mosque or minaret. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: black.
verdicts.judge_comments: Still requires repair before visual approval. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate remains a side crescent on a stem with ring base; reference witness uses a crescent-over-stem shape with circular base/dot geometry.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw with the black crescent over the stem and the circular base/dot cue from the conspicuous mosque/minaret witness; do not use a side moon glyph.

verdicts.expected: CHIMNY01 is chimney. It is used as a chimney. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate passes this automated visual rerun on symbol class, silhouette/color semantics, and reference parity. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate now reads as a brown chimney/stack with top smoke form and lower origin ring; it preserves the chimney class rather than a generic tower.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: CHIMNY11 is conspicuous chimney. It is used as a conspicuous chimney. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: black.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate passes this automated visual rerun on symbol class, silhouette/color semantics, and reference parity. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate now reads as the black conspicuous chimney/stack with top smoke form and lower origin ring; proportions are stylized but class and key visual cues match.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: CURSRB01 is cursor with open centre. It is used as a cursor with open centre. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate passes this automated visual rerun on symbol class, silhouette/color semantics, and reference parity. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate removes the center dot and leaves a clean open center between four orange cursor arms, matching the open-centre cursor references.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: CUSTOM01 is customs. It is used as a customs. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: red, white.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate passes this automated visual rerun on symbol class, silhouette/color semantics, and reference parity. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a single red/white customs roundel with central white band, matching the OpenCPN/semantic customs cue and avoiding the prior overlapping-circle substitution.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: DAYSQR01 is square or rectangular daymark, simplified. It is used as a square or rectangular daymark, simplified. Required geometry: exact topmark silhouette/count/orientation from the references. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Still requires repair before visual approval. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is still a black/yellow generic dayboard, while S-101/OpenCPN references use the provider-colored square/rectangular daymark treatment with the lower node/stem cue.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw as the provider/reference-colored square or rectangular daymark on stem, including the lower node/base cue; do not use a black/yellow generic dayboard.

verdicts.expected: DAYTRI01 is triangular daymark, point up, simplified. It is used as a triangular daymark, point up, simplified. Required geometry: exact topmark silhouette/count/orientation from the references. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Still requires repair before visual approval. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate preserves point-up triangle shape but uses a yellow/black generic dayboard treatment; references use the provider/reference color family for the simplified triangular daymark.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw the point-up triangular daymark in the provider/reference color family while preserving the upright triangle and stem.

verdicts.expected: DAYTRI05 is triangular daymark, point down, simplified. It is used as a triangular daymark, point down, simplified. Required geometry: exact topmark silhouette/count/orientation from the references. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Still requires repair before visual approval. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate preserves point-down triangle shape but uses a yellow/black generic dayboard treatment; references use the provider/reference color family for the inverted triangular daymark.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw the point-down triangular daymark in the provider/reference color family while preserving the inverted triangle and stem.

verdicts.expected: ESSARE01 is ESSA or PSSA boundary. It is used as a ESSA or PSSA boundary. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Still requires repair before visual approval. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate adds a boxed ESSA sign with dotted/baseline decoration; references call for the ESSA/PSSA boundary text/line marker, not an enclosed signboard pictogram.
verdicts.required_change: Replace the boxed ESSA sign with the ESSA/PSSA boundary text/line marker from the references; remove the invented enclosure and baseline decoration.

verdicts.expected: FORSTC01 is fortified structure. It is used as a fortified structure. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Still requires repair before visual approval. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is now a square fortified-structure mark but adds interior horizontal bars; S-101/OpenCPN witnesses are a simple brown square/outline without those invented internal marks.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw as the brown fortified-structure square/outline witness from S-101/OpenCPN; remove invented internal bars.

verdicts.expected: FORSTC11 is conspicuous fortified structure. It is used as a conspicuous fortified structure. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: black.
verdicts.judge_comments: Still requires repair before visual approval. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a black square fortified-structure mark but adds interior horizontal bars; the conspicuous reference is a simple black square/outline.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw as the black conspicuous fortified-structure square/outline witness from S-101/OpenCPN; remove invented internal bars.

verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate passes this automated visual rerun on symbol class, silhouette/color semantics, and reference parity. This is not final human approval.

verdicts.expected: LOCMAG01 is cursor pick site for a magnetic anomaly at a point. It is used as a cursor pick site for a magnetic anomaly at a point. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.

verdicts.required_change: Redraw as the LOCMAG01 magenta wedge/line magnetic-anomaly point witness; remove the A/M sign, crossbar, and dot.

verdicts.required_change: Keep the question-mark plus diagonal line/leader cue, but remove the invented dashed baseline/contour segment.
